texto: I’m his puppet and he is my invisible master, holding my strings from miles away.
explicacao: Citação de Saffron A. Kent sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I’m his puppet and he is my invisible master, holding my strings from miles away.” articula reflexao, passion, puppet em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

texto: People think it's the monsters who do bad things, but it's not. It's people like us. All the monsters ever do is live in storybooks. Or in closets. It's the humans who destroy things. Life isn't black and white, James. It's all fucking gray.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Saffron A. Kent: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “People think it's the monsters who do bad things, but it's not. It's people like us. All the mons…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, monsters, people pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
